generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque from motor current and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredCurrent
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputs : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction model outputs"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML-based engineering model for structural description of first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset description"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset description"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML-based engineering model for structural description"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SINUMERIKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction model data in a dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualization
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyAction
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling service using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model insights used to refine control algorithms for improved robot motion accuracy"
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of friction model data in dashboard"
]

instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Refinement of control algorithms based on friction model insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural description of robot first axis components"
]

instance FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in gear transmission"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in gear transmission"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing for continuous friction model identification during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A single digital shadow integrating engineering models, simulation models, data traces, and processing components for the first axis, with data linked to models for traceability and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated: the digital shadow models the robot during active operation to address wear and dynamic changes."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated versus measured data to identify friction deviations and validate model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for asset description and modeling."
]
